prestazioni: Engine swap to a bespoke 6.75L L410 V8 (original engine code) with forged internals by Cosworth, including billet crankshaft, forged Mahle pistons (9.5:1 compression), and titanium connecting rods. Pair with a custom-built Garrett GTX5533R turbocharger (1.25 A/R turbine housing) and a Tial MV-R 60mm external wastegate for 18 psi of boost, targeting 750 hp at 5,200 rpm and 850 lb-ft of torque at 3,500 rpm. Fuel system upgrade includes dual Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pumps, 1,200cc ID1700x injectors, and a custom fuel rail by Radium Engineering.

Full drivetrain reinforcement with a Quaife ATB differential (85% lockup) in the GM-sourced TH400 3-speed automatic transmission, modified by Level 10 Motorsports with a billet torque converter (3,500 stall) and a custom valve body for lightning-fast shifts. Upgraded half-shafts by The Driveshaft Shop (3.5-inch chromoly) and a custom aluminum driveshaft with CV joints to handle the increased torque.

Suspension overhaul with a full Air Lift Performance 3P management system (4-corner air struts with adjustable damping via AccuAir ENDO VT ECU) paired with custom-valved Öhlins DFV coilovers for track use. Chassis reinforcement includes a custom subframe brace by CPP (Chassis Performance Products) and a bolt-in roll cage by Custom Cages (T45 steel, 2.5-inch diameter) with integrated harness bars for FIA-spec 6-point harnesses (Schroth Profi II).
estetica: Full custom widebody conversion by Liberty Walk (LB Works kit for Silver Spur), featuring hand-formed 304 stainless steel fender flares with integrated LED turn signals (Luxx Hella-style) and carbon fiber side skirts with active air curtains (Vorsteiner carbon fiber, clear-coated with matte finish). Front bumper replaced with a bespoke 3D-printed unit (carbon fiber-reinforced nylon) incorporating a custom mesh grille (laser-cut aluminum, gold anodized) and a hidden front splitter with adjustable canards (Aeroflow Dynamics).

Rear end transformation with a custom carbon fiber ducktail spoiler (by RW Carbon) and a full-length diffuser (Aeroflow Dynamics, 3D-printed from PETG with carbon fiber weave) housing dual 4-inch titanium exhaust tips (custom-made by Burns Stainless, ceramic-coated). Side mirrors replaced with bespoke carbon fiber units (by Seibon) featuring integrated cameras (Mobius ActionCam) and LED puddle lights (Philips Luxeon).

Interior reimagined with a full Alcantara headliner (by Katzkin) and custom Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber shells, Alcantara inserts with gold stitching) mounted on custom brackets for 3-inch lower seating position. Dashboard replaced with a digital unit (Motec C127 display) housed in a carbon fiber panel (by VCarbon) with gold-plated switchgear (by Carling Technologies). Steering wheel replaced with a custom Momo Prototipo (380mm, Alcantara with gold stitching) featuring a quick-release hub (NRG Innovations) and integrated paddle shifters (for transmission control).
